notes: v0.16.8 — SHARD skin art rebaked. All four SHARD skins (PROTO / GLACIER / INFERNO / AUREATE) re-rendered from the procedural mesh used in the flyable demo. Real 3D geometry: cockpit dome, engine pods, wing tip caps. Per-skin modules — GLACIER gets stabilizer wing fins, INFERNO gets side cannons + weapon pylons, AUREATE gets the full kit + tail fin. AUREATE premium FX baked in: 3 orbital drones around the chassis (the SURGE-tier wow factor). Sized so the ship body fills ~60% of the 512px sprite — reads cleanly at the in-game 112px draw rect. Windows only.
